projectDescription: A Python library providing a personal card, blog post manager, and resume tools for displaying developer profiles in the console.
keyFeatures: Personal card display in a styled Rich console table
Blog post fetching from Hashnode GraphQL API
Resume data retrieval from JSON Resume format
CLI command `rafnixg` for instant personal card display
publicApiSurface: RafnixG — personal card class with display(), posts(), and get_links() methods
BlogPosts — fetches Hashnode blog posts via get_posts()
BlogPost — data model with title, summary, link, published, cover_image, tags
Resume — retrieves JSON Resume data with get_resume(), get_basics(), get_work(), get_education(), etc.
Basics, Work, Education, Certificate, Award, Project, Skill, Language, Reference — resume data models
Links — personal links manager with get_links()
hashnode_posts() — low-level Hashnode GraphQL API function
